channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Knueppel, Flagg help No. 2 Duke pull away late to beat rival UNC 82-69
item.description: Freshman Kon Knueppel scored 17 points to help No. 2 Duke beat rival North Carolina 82-69 on Saturday night and clinch the outright Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 2 USC, No. 4 UCLA ready to square off in Round 3 with another Big Ten championship on the line
item.description: UCLA center Lauren Betts and her teammates used a five-day break to dissect their flaws, make a few fixes and recommit themselves to beating No. 2 Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Collin Morikawa birdies final hole for a 1-shot lead at Bay Hill
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Collin Morikawa left Bay Hill a year ago with an 80 on his scorecard and a second straight missed cut in the Arnold Palmer Invitational. That wasn't on his mind when he arrived to this signature event because it was more about the state of his game than the golf course.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Barcelona's Spanish league game is postponed after death of team doctor
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona’s home game against Osasuna in the Spanish league was postponed on Saturday after the death of first-team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia. Fans were informed of the decision around 15 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick off at 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Draymond Green insinuates Knicks star missed game due to rivalry with teammate, not family friend's death
item.description: Draymond Green insinuated that Karl-Anthony Towns missed a game this week because of a rivalry with a teammate, not because of a friend's death.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs agree to bring back wide receiver Hollywood Brown after Xavier Worthy's arrest: reports
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs are bringing back star wide receiver Hollywood Brown to one-year contract worth up to $11 million on Saturday, according to numerous reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sellers and Rantanen are among the NHL trade deadline winners. Hurricanes and Boeser are some losers
item.description: Chris Patrick woke up Friday morning to see what trades around the NHL he missed. Quickly, the Washington Capitals' first-year general manager figured out that his colleagues around the league weren't bluffing about what they wanted in return.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Knicks star Jalen Brunson expected to miss at least 2 weeks with right ankle sprain
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jalen Brunson is expected to miss at least two weeks with a right ankle sprain, putting the New York Knicks in a tough spot as they try to maintain their position in the Eastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks’ Grier explains his most contentious NHL trade deadline decision
item.description: NHL trade deadline: San Jose Sharks are excited about forward Zack Ostapchuk and how he fits with organization
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Florida Panthers add veteran Brad Marchand as they gear up for run at another Stanley Cup title
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — The Florida Panthers welcomed the arrival of Boston Bruins captain Brad Marchand in a Friday trade that adds even more grit and experience to the roster of the defending Stanley Cup champions.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Xander Schauffele makes a late push and extends his PGA Tour cut streak to 58 in a row
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — After two months without competition, PGA and British Open champion Xander Schauffele set modest expectations at Bay Hill and achieved one of his goals at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. He gets two more rounds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James becomes first player in NBA to score 50K combined points
item.description: LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: USF football’s 2025 schedule revealed
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The Bulls learned the course they will chart in the 2025 South Florida Football Season presented by Tampa General Hospital, its third under Head Coach Alex Golesh, on Friday when the American Athletic Conference released the 2025 schedules for member schools.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Girls Soccer CIFSDS Open Division Championship: San Marcos 2, Bonita Vista 1
item.description: The CIFSDS Open Division Girls Soccer Championship was held at Mission Bay High School between the San Marcos Knights (17-4-3) and the Bonita Vista Barons (12-5-2).
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
